name: Portia Underbough

sheet.name: Portia Underbough
sheet.background_story:
Portia is a joyless soul whose apathy for life is matched only by her proficiency in almost all aspects of it. She is adept at combat and study, but finds no purpose in either.

She longs for death, but will not let it come unnaturally. So, she listlessly journeys across The Forsaken Lands hoping that some challenge may one day fell her.
